name: daily-deen
description: A dependency-free Sydney-time Islamic daily reading app.

scripts.build:android:play: npm run sync:android && powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/build-android-play.ps1
scripts.install:android:debug: npm run sync:android && npm run build:android:debug && powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/install-android-debug.ps1
scripts.sync:android: npm run build:web && cap sync android
scripts.sync:ios: npm run build:web && cap sync ios
